messages.content:
Select the correctly punctuated sentence.

Because of his embezzling, the company went bankrupt.

Because of his embezzling the, company went bankrupt.

Because, of his embezzling the company went bankrupt.
Because of his embezzling, the company went bankrupt.

Identify the sentence structure.
Lisa got coached because she was late.
The sentence structure is simple.

Identify the sentence structure.
While waiting for the paint to dry, Angela went to Home Depot, and Martin organized the kitchen appliances.
The sentence structure is compound.

Identify the sentence structure.
Vampires Dairies is my favorite television show, but I also love True Blood.
The sentence structure is compound.

Identify the sentence structure.
Vampires Dairies is my favorite television show, but I also love True Blood.
The sentence structure is compound.

Identify the sentence structure.
After school on Friday, I threw snowballs at some funny boys.
The sentence structure is simple.

Identify the sentence structure.
After school on Friday, I threw snowballs at some funny boys.
The sentence structure is simple.

Identify the sentence structure.
The trendy fashion designer released her new line on Wednesday.
The sentence structure is simple.

Identify the sentence structure.
Regardless of who will finish first, the point of the game is to have fun.
The sentence structure is complex.

Identify the sentence structure.
Regardless of who will finish first, the point of the game is to have fun.
The sentence structure is complex.
